case_title: KATHY THAYER VS. DANIEL P. TRUMP

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-10-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THAYER, KATHY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TRUMP, DANIEL P. CCP 340.6 BARS PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF THAYER, KATHY ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$59.50) SERVED JAN-21-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TRUMP, DANIEL P.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-16-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAR-03-2011 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT ADDITIONAL BRIEFS REGARDING STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS BY MAR 3, 2011. DEFENDANT MAY RESPOND BY MAR 10, 2011 AND DEEMED SUBMITTED ON THAT DATE. PARTIES NEED NOT APPEAR. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PLAINTIFF'S ADDITIONAL WRITTEN ARGUMENT, INFORMATION REQUESTED BY COURT WITH PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED AND FILED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF THAYER, KATHY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY THAYER, KATHY AS TO DEFENDANT TRUMP, DANIEL P. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-16-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-03-2011 - CONTINUED TO MAR-10-2011 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
